code-block.description: Displays a block of source code with syntax highlighting for the specified language, supporting line numbers, emphasized lines, caption text, and dedent options for documentation.

image.description: Inserts an image into the document with optional alternative text, dimensions, alignment, and scaling parameters for accessible and responsive documentation rendering.

figure.signature:
.. figure:: path/to/image.png
   :alt: Alt text
   :figwidth: 80%
   :align: center

   Caption text
figure.description: Inserts an image wrapped in a figure element with an optional caption and legend, providing semantic grouping for illustrations with descriptive text below them.

note.description: Creates a visually distinct admonition block to highlight important supplementary information that readers should pay attention to but is not critical or dangerous.

warning.description: Creates a prominent admonition block to alert readers about potentially dangerous operations, breaking changes, or situations that could cause data loss or errors.

toctree.description: Generates a table of contents tree linking to sub-documents, controlling navigation hierarchy depth, numbering, visibility, and captions for structured documentation sites.

ref.description: Creates a cross-reference link to a labeled location anywhere in the documentation set, automatically resolving the section title or using custom display text.

doc.description: Creates a hyperlink to another document in the documentation tree using the document name without file extension, with optional custom display text override.

automodule.description: Sphinx autodoc directive that automatically extracts and formats documentation from Python module docstrings, class definitions, and function signatures into structured output.

literalinclude.description: Includes the contents of an external file as a literal code block with syntax highlighting, supporting line range selection and emphasis for documentation examples.

glossary.signature:
.. glossary::
   :sorted:

   term
      Definition of the term.
glossary.description: Defines a glossary of terms that can be referenced elsewhere using the :term: role, automatically generating definition list formatting with optional alphabetical sorting.

deprecated.signature:
.. deprecated:: version
   Description of deprecation and migration path.
deprecated.description: Marks a feature or API as deprecated since the specified version, providing a visible notice with migration guidance for users of the documented software.
